name: Caihong Display Devices Co.,Ltd.
summary: Caihong Display Devices Co.,Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of electronic glass products in China and internationally. It offers TFT-LCD crystal substrate glasses, flat panel display devices, liquid crystal display substrate glasses, liquid crystal substrate glasses, and OLED products. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Xianyang, China.
